ValidationRule.description: An Approval record must be linked to the Opportunity before moving past Submitted stage.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Approved"), ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Pre Docs"), ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Docs Requested"), ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Docs Out"), ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Funding Request Sent"), ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Funded"), ISPICKVAL(StageName, "FPC"), ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Fully Funded") ), Approval_Count__c = 0 )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: An Approval record must be linked to this Opportunity before advancing past Submitted.
